Join the
Inner Circle

Get early access to Kenya's premier thrift app. M-Pesa drops, community events, and founding member perks.

  • check M-Pesa payments built in
  • check Verified seller badge on your profile
  • check Access to Nairobi community events
  • check Founding member badge — exclusive to early signups
lock Early access — first come, first served.

Free forever. No credit card needed.
